# Free From the System — Complete Article Index

> The system is broken. Your health doesn't have to be.

Author: Kalesh — Consciousness Teacher & Writer (https://kalesh.love)
Site: https://systemfree.love
Articles: 300 original pieces on healthcare sovereignty

## Categories

### The Escape (60 articles)
Practical strategies for leaving the traditional healthcare system.

### The Alternative (60 articles)
Evidence-based integrative and alternative health approaches.

### The Math (60 articles)
The real numbers behind healthcare costs.

### The Debt (60 articles)
Medical debt survival — rights, negotiation, recovery.

### The Sovereignty (60 articles)
Health autonomy as philosophy and practice.
